title: helianthemum × subviscosum
intro: Helianthemum × subviscosum, also known as rockrose, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the Cistaceae family. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Helianthemum × subviscosum include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and boosting the immune system. The herbal preparations of rockrose typically involve making teas, infusions, and tinctures from the plant's leaves and flowers, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
